[PDF_PAGE 41 | score=19] Magical armor is more resilient than its mundane coiuiterpart due to its enchanted nature and superior quality. A magical suit of armor can sustain four hits and an additional hit for every magical plus before breaking. Thus, a suit of draft: iimil +2 could sustain a total of 6 (4-+2for its magical bonus) hits before breaking. lijrtarr-a=:.3frr'w~ySdtioffde Shields can sustain damage during combat, as well. [PDF_PAGE 43 | score=3] armor’s defensive rating by the number of times the armor sustained damage to find out the total time required (in hours) to repair the armor. For example, if a suit of leather (AC 8) was damaged twice, it would take 4 (2><:2)hours to properly repair. Broken armor can also be repaired— although it requires more time. It takes a blacksmith one clay for every Armor Class level of the armor below ll) to repair it. Thus. broken leather armor (AC S) would take 2 (10-8) days to repair.
